---
title: "Stafford Henry Northcote, Earl of Iddesleigh"
---

## Stafford Henry Northcote, Earl of Iddesleigh

**Dates:** (1818-1887)

### Description

Conservative politician, created (1885) 1st Earl of Iddesleigh.

### Letters

- Letter from [autumn 1885]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
